results.title: Fiori Elements V2 (Adaptation Project) – Need to enforce mandatory field validation before Save/Appl
results.description: Hello SAP community, I am working on a Fiori Elements V2 application (Object Page / List Report) using an Adaptation Project (SAP BAS – codeExt Controller Extensions + UI Adaptation). I am trying to enforce a business requirement where a specific field must be mandatory before saving the document. ...
